name: Eco Water Bottles
eco_impact: Plastic bottles can take up to 450 years to decompose. Using this reusable eco water bottle helps reduce single-use plastic waste and saves approximately 50g of plastic per bottle.

name: Reusable Bags
eco_impact: Single-use plastic bags are used for minutes but take hundreds of years to decompose. Using reusable bags can replace hundreds of plastic bags annually and significantly reduce plastic pollution.

name: Hand Sanitizer
eco_impact: Using refillable or eco-friendly hand sanitizers reduces plastic waste from single-use bottles and lowers environmental impact compared to disposable packaging.

name: Eco Soaps
eco_impact: Eco-friendly soaps are made using natural, biodegradable ingredients that reduce water pollution and avoid harmful chemicals, helping protect aquatic life and skin health.

name: FaceWash
eco_impact: Eco-friendly face wash uses biodegradable ingredients and sustainable packaging, reducing chemical runoff into water systems and minimizing plastic waste.

name: Natural Extracted Edible Oil
eco_impact: Naturally extracted edible oils are produced using minimal chemical processing and sustainable farming practices, reducing environmental pollution and promoting soil and ecosystem health.

name: Eco Brush
eco_impact: Eco brushes made from bamboo or natural materials decompose naturally and help reduce plastic waste that would otherwise take hundreds of years to break down.

name: Refillable Glass Water Bottle with Sleeve
eco_impact: Refillable glass water bottles eliminate the need for single-use plastic bottles and are fully recyclable, helping reduce plastic pollution and long-term environmental waste.
